title: Rai Stones
description: Rai stones from Yap are a classic case of socially recognized monetary ownership where transfer can occur without physically moving the asset. They illustrate that money depends on shared ledgers and social consensus.

resources.title: Rai Stones (Wikipedia)
resources.notes: Historical overview and references for Yap stone money.

resources.title: The Ascent of Money
resources.notes: Broad monetary-history context that includes unusual money forms.

resources.title: History of Money
resources.notes: Accessible bridge from historical money forms to Bitcoin thinking.

resources.title: The Bitcoin Standard
resources.notes: Uses Yap stone money as a memorable case study in social consensus and monetary history.
